docs.title: qsim 文档
docs.text:
本目录包含两部分：

  • Wiki：实现说明、限制说明、建议阅读顺序。
  • API Reference：由源码 docstring 自动生成。

docs.title: 快速开始
docs.text:
安装文档依赖：

pip install -e .[docs]

本地预览：

mkdocs serve

构建静态站点：

mkdocs build

docs.title: Docs Directory vs Site Directory
docs.text:
• docs/: source markdown and doc-generation scripts tracked as editable documentation sources.
  • site/: generated static website output from mkdocs build.

They are not duplicated functionality: - edit content in docs/ - preview/build output in site/

Recommended workflow:

mkdocs serve   # local preview
mkdocs build   # regenerate site/

docs.title: qsim Wiki
docs.text:
WIKI 已分页，按主题阅读：

  • 概览
  • 电路层
  • 后端与模型
  • 噪声与求解器
  • 可视化
  • IO 与会话
  • 差距清单

推荐从 概览 开始。

docs.text: 本页与子页由 docs/scripts/gen_ref_pages.py 自动生成，内容来自 src/qsim 的 docstring。

docs.title: API - backend
docs.text: src/qsim/backend 下模块：

docs.text: Execute a list of circuit passes and emit compile report.

docs.title: run(circuit, config, hardware=None)
docs.text:
Run all passes and return normalized circuit plus report.

Example 
from qsim.backend.compile_pipeline import CompilePipeline

normalized, report = CompilePipeline().run(circuit, cfg, hardware={})
print(report["final_gate_count"])

Protocol for circuit transformation pass in compile pipeline.

docs.title: DefaultLowering
docs.text: Default gate-to-pulse lowering with simple serial scheduling.

docs.title: lower(schedule_or_circuit, hw, cfg)
docs.text:
Lower CircuitIR to PulseIR and ExecutableModel.

Reset lowering uses a measurement-driven sequence: 1) reset readout pulse (RO_*, stage=reset_measure) 2) resonator depletion pulse (RO_*, stage=reset_deplete) 3) feedback latency window 4) optional conditional pi pulse (XY_*, stage=reset_conditional_pi)

Notes: - The feedback pulse is a conditional pi, not a pi/2 pulse. - Consecutive reset instructions are aligned in parallel by default. - barrier is treated as a no-op (no pulse, no time advance).

Hardware knobs: - reset_measure_duration, reset_deplete_duration, reset_latency_duration - reset_pi_duration, reset_measure_amp, reset_deplete_amp, reset_pi_amp - reset_cond_on, reset_apply_feedback

docs.title: ILowering

Bases: Protocol

Parse a minimal OpenQASM 3 program into CircuitIR.

Example 
from qsim.circuit.import_qasm import CircuitAdapter

qasm = "OPENQASM 3; qubit[1] q; x q[0];"
cir = CircuitAdapter.from_qasm(qasm)
print(cir.num_qubits, len(cir.gates))

Supported solvers: - se: Schrodinger equation - me: master equation - mcwf: Monte-Carlo wave-function

docs.title: canonicalize_channel_names(pulse_ir)

This helper keeps pulse content unchanged and only rewrites channel names to a consistent underscore style expected by timing plots.

docs.title: dump_json(path, payload)

docs.title: export_json_table(json_path, out_path, *, rows_key=None)

docs.title: load_trace_h5(path)

docs.title: make_timing_theme(**overrides)
docs.text: Build timing-plot theme with optional overrides.

docs.title: plot_pulses(pulse_ir, sample_rate=1.0, show_carrier=True, carrier_undersample=32, carrier_points_per_pulse=800, timing_layout=False, title=None, breaks=None, auto_fold_idle=False, idle_threshold_ns=50000.0, keep_edge_ns=1500.0, show_clock=False, clock_mhz=DEFAULT_CLOCK_MHZ, carrier_plot_max_hz=None, carrier_samples_per_cycle=DEFAULT_CARRIER_SAMPLES_PER_CYCLE, envelope_points_per_pulse=DEFAULT_ENVELOPE_POINTS_PER_PULSE, black_white=False, uppercase=False, channel_label_fontsize=DEFAULT_CHANNEL_LABEL_FONTSIZE, tick_fontsize=DEFAULT_TICK_FONTSIZE, title_fontsize=DEFAULT_TITLE_FONTSIZE, axis_label_fontsize=DEFAULT_AXIS_LABEL_FONTSIZE, break_display_gap_ns=DEFAULT_BREAK_DISPLAY_GAP_NS, show_grid=False, hide_top_right_spines=True, dxf_path=None, png_path=None, dxf_style=None, theme=None, dxf_from_figure=True, annotate_pulses=True, pulse_label_fontsize=8, pulse_metadata_path=None, post_sequence_gap_ns=DEFAULT_POST_SEQUENCE_GAP_NS, target_ticks=DEFAULT_TARGET_TICKS)
docs.text:
Plot pulse waveforms and optionally export a DXF engineering drawing.

This function supports two plotting modes: - timing_layout=False: legacy compact waveform view sampled at fixed sample_rate. - timing_layout=True: timing-diagram view with per-channel rows, optional break/folding, clock lane, custom typography/colors, and optional DXF export.

Parameters - pulse_ir: Pulse schedule to visualize. - sample_rate: Fixed sample rate for legacy mode (timing_layout=False). - show_carrier: Whether to draw carrier components. - carrier_undersample: Legacy mode carrier decimation factor. - carrier_points_per_pulse: Legacy mode sampling points per pulse for carrier. - timing_layout: Enable timing-diagram style plot. - title: Figure title. If None, a default title is used. - breaks: Explicit folded time windows. Accepts (t0, t1) tuples or dicts with t0/t1. - auto_fold_idle: Auto-generate fold windows for long all-channel idle regions when breaks is not provided. - idle_threshold_ns: Minimum idle duration for auto_fold_idle. - keep_edge_ns: Keep this amount near both sides when folding idle windows. - show_clock: Add top CLK lane in timing mode. - clock_mhz: Clock frequency for the CLK lane. - carrier_plot_max_hz: Visualization cap for carrier frequency to avoid over-dense lines. - carrier_samples_per_cycle: Samples per carrier cycle in timing mode. - envelope_points_per_pulse: Minimum envelope sample points per visible segment. - black_white: Use monochrome styling. - uppercase: Uppercase channel labels/title text. - channel_label_fontsize: Font size of channel row labels. - tick_fontsize: Font size of custom time tick labels. - title_fontsize: Plot title font size. - axis_label_fontsize: Time axis label font size. - break_display_gap_ns: Visual gap width for each folded segment in timing mode. - show_grid: Whether to show background grid. - hide_top_right_spines: Hide matplotlib top/right frame spines. - dxf_path: If provided, export DXF using the same pulse_ir and break settings. - png_path: Optional output path to save the rendered matplotlib figure as PNG. If provided, fig.savefig(png_path) is executed inside this function. - dxf_style: Optional style overrides passed to DXF renderer. - theme: Unified timing theme dict that drives both matplotlib and DXF styles. - dxf_from_figure: If True in timing layout, export DXF by extracting primitives directly from the matplotlib figure for maximal visual consistency. - annotate_pulses: In timing layout, annotate each pulse with sequential ids (p1, p2, ...). - pulse_label_fontsize: Font size for pulse id annotations. - pulse_metadata_path: If set, write a JSON file containing all pulse metadata, including timing, amplitude, shape, params, and carrier values (if present). - post_sequence_gap_ns: Keep this zero-amplitude tail after the last pulse to indicate experiment end. - target_ticks: Target number of major ticks on time axis in timing layout.

Returns - matplotlib.figure.Figure: Generated figure object.

Notes - Timing-break markers use dotted lines in matplotlib output.

docs.title: plot_report(report)
docs.text: Plot error budget bar chart from analysis report.

docs.title: plot_trace(trace)

docs.title: pulse_ir_from_qasm(qasm_text, *, backend_config, hardware=None, canonicalize_names=True, include_empty_z=True)

Compile OpenQASM text into PulseIR for visualization.

Parameters - qasm_text: OpenQASM 3 program string. - backend_config: Backend config object or YAML path. - hardware: Optional hardware knobs consumed by lowering. - canonicalize_names: Convert channel names to underscore style. - include_empty_z: Add missing Z_i channels for all declared qubits.

docs.title: API - session
docs.text: src/qsim/session 下模块：

docs.title: SessionManifest dataclass
docs.text: In-memory manifest for session revision metadata.

docs.title: load(path, session_id) classmethod
docs.text: Load manifest from JSON file or create an empty one.

docs.title: save(path)
docs.text: Persist manifest to JSON file.

docs.title: Session
docs.text:
Versioned artifact session with manifest-based indexing.

Example 
from qsim.session.session import Session

s = Session.open("runs/session_a")
rev = s.commit("circuit", {"schema_version": "1.0", "qasm": "OPENQASM 3;"})
print(s.get(rev))

docs.text: Store an artifact revision and append metadata to session manifest.

docs.text: Resolve artifact path by revision ID.

docs.text: Open or initialize a session directory.

docs.text: Load one JSON artifact by kind/revision.

docs.title: put_json(kind, rev_id, payload)

docs.title: API - ui
docs.text: src/qsim/ui 下模块：

docs.title: build_parser()
docs.text: Build command-line parser for qsim workflow entrypoint.

docs.title: main()
docs.text:
CLI entrypoint.

Example 
qsim run --qasm examples/bell.qasm --backend examples/backend.yaml --out runs/demo

docs.title: plot_default(result)
docs.text:
Create default plotting bundle from run_workflow result.

Returns a dict containing matplotlib figures with keys: pulses, trace, and report.

docs.title: run_workflow(qasm_text, backend_path, out_dir, hardware=None, noise=None, engine='qutip', persist_artifacts=True, export_dxf=True)
docs.text:
Run the full qsim workflow and optionally persist artifacts.

参数：

名称 类型 描述 默认 qasm_text str

OpenQASM 3 program text.

必需 backend_path str

Path to backend YAML config.

必需 out_dir str

Output directory for generated artifacts.

必需 hardware dict | None

Optional hardware/model override parameters.

None noise dict | None

Optional noise override parameters.

None engine str

Engine name, e.g. qutip.

'qutip' persist_artifacts bool

Whether to write artifacts to disk.

True export_dxf bool

Whether to export DXF timing diagram.

True

返回：

类型 描述 dict

A result dict containing circuit, model, trace, analysis, and timings.

Example 
from pathlib import Path
from qsim.ui.notebook import run_workflow

result = run_workflow(
    qasm_text=Path("examples/bell.qasm").read_text(encoding="utf-8"),
    backend_path="examples/backend.yaml",
    out_dir="runs/demo_docs",
    engine="qutip",
)
print(result["trace"].engine, result["timings"]["total"])

docs.title: 模型层级
docs.text:
通过 hardware.simulation_level 选择：

  • qubit -> qubit_network
  • nlevel -> transmon_nlevel
  • cqed -> cqed_jc

并包含自动回退逻辑（例如 cqed 且 cavity_nmax<=0 时回退到 nlevel/qubit）。

docs.title: Hamiltonian 构成
docs.text:
• 漂移项：qubit_freqs_hz、anharmonicity_hz、cavity_freq_hz
  • 耦合项：couplings、g_cavity_hz
  • 控制项：由 PulseIR 采样映射到 controls

docs.title: 脉冲形状
docs.text:
• rect/dc
  • gaussian
  • drag
  • readout

默认门到脉冲映射：

  • x/sx/h -> XY* Gaussian
  • z/rz -> Z* DC
  • cx/cz -> 双通道 DRAG
  • measure -> RO* Readout

docs.title: 已实现
docs.text:
• 导入：OpenQASM 3 文本、Qiskit 电路
  • 导出：OpenQASM 3、Qiskit 电路
  • 中间表示：CircuitIR、CircuitGate
  • 编译归一化：CompilePipeline + NormalizePass

docs.title: 当前支持门
docs.text:
• 单比特：x、sx、h、z、rz
  • 双比特：cx、cz
  • 测量：measure

docs.title: 限制
docs.text:
• 仅支持 OpenQASM 3 的最小可用子集
  • 参数化门若无 lowering 映射，不会转成特定物理脉冲
  • 当前调度是串行 cursor 推进模型

docs.title: 差距清单
docs.text:
当前明确未完成项：

  1. 完整 OpenQASM 3 语义与高级控制流
  2. 多腔/多模 cQED 全模型
  3. 严格非马尔可夫噪声求解器与相关噪声矩阵
  4. Julia 实后端求解（非 mock）
  5. 统一实验数据库与大规模检索
  6. 更细粒度的 API 文档规范校验（参数约束、异常行为、版本变更日志）

docs.title: run_workflow 产物
docs.text:
典型输出：

  • circuit.json
  • backend_config.json
  • normalized_circuit.json
  • compile_report.json
  • pulse_ir.json
  • pulse_samples.npz
  • executable_model.json
  • model_spec.json
  • trace.h5
  • observables.json
  • report.json
  • settings_report.json
  • run_manifest.json
  • timings.json
  • timing_diagram.dxf（可选）

docs.title: 会话存储
docs.text:
会话接口：

  • Session.open(path)
  • Session.commit(kind, payload, ...)
  • Session.get(rev_id)

底层由 ArtifactStore 和 SessionManifest 负责版本化与索引。

docs.title: 噪声模型
docs.text:
noise.model 支持：

  • markovian_lindblad（默认）
  • one_over_f
  • ou（Ornstein-Uhlenbeck）

常见参数：

  • t1/t2/tphi/tup（可按比特）
  • gamma1/gamma_phi/gamma_up（可按比特）

关系式：

  • gamma1 = 1/T1
  • gamma_up = 1/Tup
  • 1/T2 = (gamma1 + gamma_up)/2 + gamma_phi

docs.title: 求解器
docs.text:
QuTiPEngine 支持：

  • se -> sesolve
  • me -> mesolve
  • mcwf -> mcsolve

julia_qtoolbox 与 julia_qoptics 当前是占位实现（mock）。

docs.title: Wiki 概览
docs.text:
主入口是 qsim.ui.notebook.run_workflow(...)，流水线顺序为：

  1. 电路导入（QASM / Qiskit）
  2. 归一化编译（CompilePipeline）
  3. Lowering 到脉冲（PulseIR）
  4. 构建物理模型（ModelSpec）
  5. 数值求解（Engine.run）
  6. 分析与产物导出

建议优先查看产物：

  1. settings_report.json
  2. model_spec.json
  3. timings.json
  4. trace.h5 / observables.json / report.json

docs.title: 可视化
docs.text:
本页说明脉冲可视化模块 qsim.pulse.visualize 的推荐用法，包含：

  • OpenQASM -> PulseIR 翻译
  • matplotlib 时序图渲染
  • DXF 工程图导出（与 matplotlib 图元一致）
  • 脉冲编号 p1/p2/... 与参数 JSON 导出

docs.title: 主要入口
docs.text:
• pulse_ir_from_qasm(...)
  • plot_pulses(...)
  • auto_fold_long_pulses(...)
  • reorder_xy_z_channels(...)

docs.title: 一般工作流
docs.text:
1. 准备 QASM 文本和 backend 配置（YAML）。
  2. 调用 pulse_ir_from_qasm(...) 得到 PulseIR。
  3. 用 reorder_xy_z_channels(...) 调整通道顺序（XY_0, Z_0, XY_1, Z_1, ...）。
  4. 用 auto_fold_long_pulses(...) 生成断点（常用于 RO 长脉冲）。
  5. 调用 plot_pulses(..., timing_layout=True, dxf_path=...) 同时产出 PNG + DXF。

docs.title: 关键特性
docs.text:
• 黑白风格与 Times New Roman 字体
  • 顶部 CLK 方波（100 MHz，可配）
  • 断点折叠（所有通道与时间轴一致折叠）
  • 载波虚线仅在存在高频脉冲区间绘制
  • 每个脉冲可自动打标签：p1, p2, ...
  • 可导出 pulse_metadata.json，记录脉冲参数明细

docs.title: plot_pulses 关键参数
docs.text:
• timing_layout=True：开启时序图模式
  • breaks=[(t0, t1), ...]：指定折叠区间
  • show_clock=True, clock_mhz=100.0：绘制时钟通道
  • carrier_plot_max_hz=0.5e9：高频可视化上限
  • dxf_path=...：导出 DXF
  • dxf_from_figure=True：从 matplotlib figure 直接抽取图元，保证一致性
  • annotate_pulses=True：显示 p1/p2/...
  • pulse_metadata_path=...：输出脉冲参数 JSON

docs.title: 示例
docs.text:
from pathlib import Path
from qsim.pulse.visualize import (
    auto_fold_long_pulses,
    plot_pulses,
    pulse_ir_from_qasm,
    reorder_xy_z_channels,
)

qasm_text = Path("input.qasm").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
pulse_ir = pulse_ir_from_qasm(
    qasm_text,
    backend_config="backend.yaml",
    hardware={
        "xy_freq_hz": 5.0e9,
        "ro_freq_hz": 8.0e9,
        "gate_duration": 20.0,
        "measure_duration": 2000.0,
    },
)
pulse_ir = reorder_xy_z_channels(pulse_ir)
breaks = auto_fold_long_pulses(pulse_ir, channel_prefixes=("RO",))

fig = plot_pulses(
    pulse_ir,
    timing_layout=True,
    title="SINGLE QUBIT CPMG",
    show_carrier=True,
    show_clock=True,
    breaks=breaks,
    dxf_path="timing_diagram.dxf",
    annotate_pulses=True,
    pulse_metadata_path="pulse_metadata.json",
)
fig.savefig("timing_python.png", dpi=180)

docs.title: 1) Denser time ticks
docs.text:
plot_pulses(..., timing_layout=True) now accepts target_ticks:

fig = plot_pulses(
    pulse_ir,
    timing_layout=True,
    target_ticks=18,  # denser major ticks on the custom time axis
)

docs.title: 2) Reset pulse semantics
docs.text:
reset lowering is measurement-driven and does not use pi/2 feedback:

  • RO_* reset_measure
  • RO_* reset_deplete
  • latency window
  • optional conditional pi pulse on XY_* (reset_conditional_pi)

Control with hardware knob:

hardware = {
    "reset_apply_feedback": True,   # default
    # False -> keep measurement/depletion path only
}

docs.title: 3) JSON to CSV / XLSX export
docs.text:
Use export_json_table to flatten JSON records (including nested dict fields):

from qsim.pulse.visualize import export_json_table

export_json_table(
    "runs/surface code 3/surface_code_3/pulse_metadata.json",
    "runs/surface code 3/surface_code_3/pulse_metadata.csv",
)

XLSX is also supported:

export_json_table("pulse_metadata.json", "pulse_metadata.xlsx")

(.xlsx requires openpyxl)
